summary: Comprehensive validation of High Roller VIP MVP + 100K scaling foundation. Backend: 13/14 new tests PASS; regression shield 339/339 GREEN. Frontend: /casino/high-roller renders all 3 tier cards (Genius $49 / Genesis $99 / Apex $249) with locked pricing; /casino/high-roller/blackjack correctly renders VIP-required upsell (vip-blackjack-locked) for non-VIP demo user. CRITICAL ISOLATION GUARANTEE VERIFIED: standard /api/blackjack/deal still enforces 50-coin floor — VIP 10k floor does NOT leak. apply_vip_grant idempotency confirmed via direct DB.

critical.issue: Returns HTTP 500 due to TypeError in sort lambda at routes/cloudflare_stream.py:276. Expression `-((s.get('last_status_at') or s.get('created_at') or '') and 1)` short-circuits to empty string '' when both timestamps are missing/empty, then unary minus on str raises TypeError. This breaks the Live Now Wall endpoint. NOT a Redis cache issue — cache fallback works (cache_get returns None gracefully without REDIS_URL). Fix: replace lambda with `-1 if (s.get('last_status_at') or s.get('created_at')) else 0` (or use proper key ordering).

action_items: Fix routes/cloudflare_stream.py:276 sort lambda — `-(str and 1)` fails when both timestamps absent (TypeError: bad operand type for unary -: 'str'). Endpoint /api/streaming/cloudflare/live-inputs currently returns 500.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/high_roller.py is clean, ~307 lines, idiomatic. Idempotency, tier-downgrade-protection, and VIP gate logic all correct.
services/high_roller_economy.py centralises pricing constants — good single source of truth.
Test isolation verified: VIP 10k floor lives only in /api/high-roller/blackjack/deal; public /api/blackjack/deal untouched.
scale_cache.py cache_get/cache_set both no-op gracefully without REDIS_URL — confirmed.
BUG: cloudflare_stream.py:276 lambda has falsy short-circuit landmine — see action item.

success_rate.backend: 92.8% (13/14 new tests pass; 1 fail is pre-existing cloudflare_stream bug unrelated to High Roller MVP)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all High Roller MVP testids present; VIP-locked upsell renders correctly)

test_credentials: Demo login via login-demo-btn; betatester1@globalvibez.com / BetaTester2026!
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed users in high_roller_vip collection; cleaned up via pymongo delete_one in fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `cd /app/backend && set -a && source .env && set +a && DISABLE_BG_SCHEDULERS=1 pytest tests/test_high_roller_mvp.py tests/regression_shield.py -q` — expect 339+13/14 pass. The single fail (TestCloudflareLiveInputs::test_live_inputs_endpoint_responds) is a pre-existing cloudflare_stream.py sort-lambda bug, not a High Roller regression. Once that lambda is fixed, all 14 will pass. To re-grant VIP without Stripe, write directly to mongo collection `high_roller_vip` with `{user_id, tier, vip_until: <future ISO>, last_grant_session_id, grant_count: 1}`.
rca_of_the_issue: Cloudflare 500: lambda `-((a or b or '') and 1)` — when both `a` and `b` are None/empty, Python evaluates `'' and 1` = `''` (empty string is falsy, `and` short-circuits to LHS). Then `-''` → TypeError. Triggered whenever any returned live-input row has both `last_status_at` AND `created_at` missing. Fix: `-(1 if (s.get('last_status_at') or s.get('created_at')) else 0)`.
